stable.release_notes:
## What's Changed

This release contains the following component updates:

- **[GnosisVPN Client](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client)**: Updated from [v0.82.0](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client/releases/tag/v0.82.0) to [v0.85.0](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client/releases/tag/v0.85.0)
- **[GnosisVPN App](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app)**: Updated from [v0.24.0](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app/releases/tag/v0.24.0) to [v0.27.0](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app/releases/tag/v0.27.0)


### New Features

- [Installer] feat: Remove draft releases as they are not need it anymore when snapshots are built by @ausias-armesto in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn#182](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn/pull/182)
- [Installer] feat: Allow to manual trigger a new Snapshot build by @ausias-armesto in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn#183](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn/pull/183)
- [Installer] feat: Add new exit location for Jura in Amsterdam by @ausias-armesto in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn#175](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn/pull/175)
- [Installer] feat: Expose pacakge version to installed app by @mjadach-iv in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn#173](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn/pull/173)
- [Installer] feat: Add nightly builds by @ausias-armesto in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn#170](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn/pull/170)
- [Client] feat: expose ticket price and winning probability to enable real traffic calculation by @esterlus in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client#504](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client/pull/504)
- [Client] feat: enhance status command to reflect pending connections and work in offline state by @esterlus in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client#494](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client/pull/494)
- [Client] feat: consolidate connectivity and exit health into route health by @esterlus in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client#490](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client/pull/490)
- [Client] feat: expose ticket value by @ilge-ustun in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client#484](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client/pull/484)
- [Client] feat: Introduce snapshot builds in workflows by @ausias-armesto in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client#468](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client/pull/468)
- [App] feat: show recovery countdown when hitting 100% sync progress by @esterlus in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app#258](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app/pull/258)
- [App] feat: adjust to newly propagated status response making status response more efficient by @esterlus in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app#253](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app/pull/253)
- [App] feat: show GB / wxHOPR and remaining credit by @ilge-ustun in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app#248](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app/pull/248)
- [App] feat: adjust to new exit health reporting by @esterlus in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app#252](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app/pull/252)
- [App] feat: Create snapshot builds by @ausias-armesto in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app#236](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app/pull/236)


### Fixes

- [Installer] fix: remove unusable locations until they are fixed by @esterlus in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn#188](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn/pull/188)
- [Installer] fix: Change the GitHub token used to release by @ausias-armesto in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn#179](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn/pull/179)
- [Installer] fix: Fix the content of the release notes to not reference latest but the specific semver by @ausias-armesto in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn#178](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn/pull/178)
- [Installer] fix: How the tag is computed for release notes by @ausias-armesto in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn#177](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn/pull/177)
- [Installer] fix: Fixes generation of release notes to not rely on existing release by @ausias-armesto in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn#176](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn/pull/176)
- [Installer] fix(ci): upgrade artifact actions to v7 to avoid Node 20 deprecation by @esterlus in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn#169](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn/pull/169)
- [Client] fix: improve destination readability by @esterlus in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client#503](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client/pull/503)
- [Client] fix: rewrite nix libiconv dylib paths to system lib on macOS by @esterlus in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client#502](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client/pull/502)
- [Client] fix: static builds by @esterlus in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client#500](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client/pull/500)
- [Client] fix: Change the GitHub token used to release by @ausias-armesto in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client#492](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client/pull/492)
- [Client] fix: match relay address instead of exit address in balance funding s… by @esterlus in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client#483](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client/pull/483)
- [App] fix: traffic cost calculation by @esterlus in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app#257](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app/pull/257)
- [App] fix: ensure copy address button is always visible on funding screen by @esterlus in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app#256](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app/pull/256)
- [App] fix: better description on incompatbile version by @esterlus in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app#254](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app/pull/254)
- [App] fix: Adapt to the new release-version-v3 parameters by @ausias-armesto in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app#251](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app/pull/251)
- [App] fix: black screen issue with multiple windows on ubuntu by @mjadach-iv in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app#247](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app/pull/247)
- [App] fix: theme switching on linux by @ilge-ustun in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app#237](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app/pull/237)
- [App] fix: Keep the previous binary name by @ausias-armesto in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app#250](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app/pull/250)


### Automation

- [Installer] chore: mention installer generation scripts in package.json description by @esterlus in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn#184](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn/pull/184)
- [Client] chore(version): bump to v0.84.0 by @esterlus in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client#501](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client/pull/501)
- [Client] chore(deps): update rust crate rand to v0.10.1 [security] by @renovate[bot] in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client#486](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client/pull/486)
- [Client] chore(ci): bump upload-artifact from v5 to v7 by @esterlus in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client#481](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-client/pull/481)
- [App] chore(version): bump to v0.26.0 by @esterlus in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app#255](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app/pull/255)
- [App] chore(ci): update upload-artifact action from v5 to v7 by @esterlus in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app#239](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app/pull/239)


### Other

- [App] Removing on Demand image scanning in CI workflow by @atifather in [gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app#242](https://github.com/gnosis/gnosis_vpn-app/pull/242)
